name: Ask Concentration Contra (Extreme Z-Score)
hypothesis: Test the absolute conviction limit of the 'ask_depth_concentration' signal by pushing the z-score threshold to an extreme level (7.5), as suggested by prior feedback, to confirm if an even purer, though rarer, signal can be isolated before performance collapses.
mutation_note: Following feedback to confirm the performance peak, this is a very aggressive threshold increase from 6.0 to 7.5 to test the absolute limit of this signal.
